originalTitle: End of the Line | Shion Hero Trailer | Overwatch
content: Time to find out who the streets of Tokyo really belong to. Join Shion, our newest Hero and the Hashimoto Clan's most terrifying elder, as she battles against Sojourn in our latest Hero Trailer, End of the Line. Find out what happens next in the Reign of Talon when Season 3: Into the Tiger’s Den arrives on June 16. Overwatch is free to play on PC and console, now including Nintendo Switch™ 2"! _ Follow #Overwatch for the latest news: Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playoverwatch TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@overwatch Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/playoverwatch Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/playoverwatch
chineseTitle: | 线 | 路 | 结 | 束 | | | | 紫 | 苑 | 英 | 雄 | 预 | 告 | 片 | | | | 守 | 望 | 先 | 锋 |
chineseContent: 是时候找出东京的街道到底属于谁了。与我们最新的英雄、桥本氏族最可怕的长老 Shion 一起，在我们最新的英雄预告片《End of the Line》中与 Sojourn 作战。了解《利爪的统治》第三季：虎穴奇兵将于 6 月 16 日到来时发生的事情。《守望先锋》可在 PC 和主机上免费畅玩，现在包括 Nintendo Switch™ 2”！_ 关注#Overwatch 了解最新消息： Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/playoverwatch TikTok：https://www.tiktok.com/@overwatch Twitter：http://www.twitter.com/playoverwatch Facebook： http://www.facebook.com/playoverwatch
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
